mapper.insert: INSERT INTO AUDIT_EVENT ( AUDIT_ID, PROJECT_ID, TRACE_ID, REQUEST_ID, ACTOR_ID, ACTOR_ROLE, MENU_CODE, PAGE_ID, ACTION_CODE, ENTITY_TYPE, ENTITY_ID, BEFORE_SUMMARY, AFTER_SUMMARY, RESULT_STATUS, REASON_SUMMARY, IP_ADDRESS, USER_AGENT, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{auditId}, #{projectId}, #{traceId}, #{requestId}, #{actorId}, #{actorRole}, #{menuCode}, #{pageId}, #{actionCode}, #{entityType}, #{entityId}, #{beforeSummaryJson, typeHandler=egovframework.com.config.data.CubridClobStringTypeHandler}, #{afterSummaryJson, typeHandler=egovframework.com.config.data.CubridClobStringTypeHandler}, #{resultStatus}, #{reasonSummary}, #{ipAddress}, #{userAgent}, CURRENT_DATETIME )

INSERT INTO TRACE_EVENT ( EVENT_ID, PROJECT_ID, TRACE_ID, SPAN_ID, PARENT_SPAN_ID, EVENT_TYPE, PAGE_ID, COMPONENT_ID, FUNCTION_ID, API_ID, RESULT_CODE, DURATION_MS, PAYLOAD_SUMMARY, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{eventId}, #{projectId}, #{traceId}, #{spanId}, #{parentSpanId}, #{eventType}, #{pageId}, #{componentId}, #{functionId}, #{apiId}, #{resultCode}, #{durationMs}, #{payloadSummaryJson, typeHandler=egovframework.com.config.data.CubridClobStringTypeHandler}, CURRENT_DATETIME )

INSERT INTO ACCESS_EVENT ( EVENT_ID, PROJECT_ID, TRACE_ID, REQUEST_ID, PAGE_ID, API_ID, REQUEST_URI, HTTP_METHOD, FEATURE_TYPE, ACTOR_ID, ACTOR_TYPE, ACTOR_ROLE, ACTOR_INSTT_ID, COMPANY_CONTEXT_ID, TARGET_COMPANY_CONTEXT_ID, REMOTE_ADDR, RESPONSE_STATUS, DURATION_MS, REQUEST_CONTENT_TYPE, "QUERY_STRING", PARAMETER_SUMMARY, ERROR_MESSAGE, COMPANY_SCOPE_DECISION, COMPANY_SCOPE_REASON, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{eventId}, #{projectId}, #{traceId}, #{requestId}, #{pageId}, #{apiId}, #{requestUri}, #{httpMethod}, #{featureType}, #{actorId}, #{actorType}, #{actorRole}, #{actorInsttId}, #{companyContextId}, #{targetCompanyContextId}, #{remoteAddr}, #{responseStatus}, #{durationMs}, #{requestContentType}, #{queryString}, #{parameterSummary, typeHandler=egovframework.com.config.data.CubridClobStringTypeHandler}, #{errorMessage, typeHandler=egovframework.com.config.data.CubridClobStringTypeHandler}, #{companyScopeDecision}, #{companyScopeReason, typeHandler=egovframework.com.config.data.CubridClobStringTypeHandler}, CURRENT_DATETIME )

INSERT INTO ERROR_EVENT ( ERROR_ID, PROJECT_ID, TRACE_ID, REQUEST_ID, PAGE_ID, API_ID, SOURCE_TYPE, ERROR_TYPE, ACTOR_ID, ACTOR_ROLE, ACTOR_INSTT_ID, REQUEST_URI, REMOTE_ADDR, MESSAGE, STACK_SUMMARY, RESULT_STATUS, USER_AGENT, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{errorId}, #{projectId}, #{traceId}, #{requestId}, #{pageId}, #{apiId}, #{sourceType}, #{errorType}, #{actorId}, #{actorRole}, #{actorInsttId}, #{requestUri}, #{remoteAddr}, #{message, typeHandler=egovframework.com.config.data.CubridClobStringTypeHandler}, #{stackSummary, typeHandler=egovframework.com.config.data.CubridClobStringTypeHandler}, #{resultStatus}, #{userAgent}, CURRENT_DATETIME )
